# moodle Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "moodle" {
  host           = "https://moodle.example.com"
  token          = "moodle_service_token"
  moodle_version = "4.0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host` (String)
- `token` (String, Sensitive)

### Optional

- `moodle_version` (String) The Moodle version of the target instance (e.g. "4.3").
